info.title: InkRamp Platform API
info.description:
OpenAPI contract for InkRamp REST endpoints deployed behind API Gateway.
This specification is aligned with the current service routing and Postman journey tests.
Each deployed stack also serves this contract at /docs/openapi.yaml with Swagger UI at /docs.
Browser CORS policy is centralized through shared gateway/runtime configuration and always includes https://inkramp.github.io plus localhost defaults.

get.summary: Get roles for current authenticated user

post.summary: Build role-aware dummy seed users for manual seeding
post.description: Authenticated-user-driven seed endpoint. The request body is ignored; send `{}` only when you want an explicit empty-object contract in clients or Postman.

201.description: Seed user actors for the current authenticated session

post.summary: Seed buyer, supplier, and buyer-selection journey data
post.description: Authenticated-user-driven seed endpoint. The request body is ignored; send `{}` only when you want an explicit empty-object contract in clients or Postman.

post.summary: Cleanup seeded journey data and suffix-tagged E2E artifacts
Seed supplier catalog items for manual journeys
Cleanup seeded catalog data and suffix-tagged catalog artifacts
Seed buyer query, supplier inbox, and buyer selection RFQs
Cleanup seeded RFQs and suffix-tagged RFQ artifacts

get.summary: Get a quote by id for an RFQ

put.summary: Replace a quote for an RFQ

patch.summary: Update a quote for an RFQ

delete.summary: Delete a quote for an RFQ

post.summary: Seed comparable supplier quotes for buyer selection
Cleanup seeded quotes and suffix-tagged quote artifacts

get.summary: List documents visible to the caller

post.summary: Create upload request and receive presigned URL

get.summary: Get processing status for a document

post.summary: Run AI completion with tool/action definitions
Stream AG-UI compatible SSE events for buyer AI interactions

get.summary: List AI runs for the current authenticated user

inbound.description: JSON body with messages array, optional model and systemPrompt.

seedSuffix.description: Suffix used by E2E-created artifacts that should be deleted with the seeded data.

SeedUsersRequest.description: Empty object only. The endpoint reads the authenticated user context and ignores request-body fields, so callers should omit the body or send `{}` for clarity.

SeedBootstrapRequest.description: Empty object only. The endpoint derives seed actors from the authenticated user context and ignores request-body fields, so callers should omit the body or send `{}` for clarity.
